prompt: Create a workflow that receives an HTTP POST at /onboarding with new employee data. First, create accounts in parallel: email account, Slack workspace, and project management tool. After all three accounts are created, send a welcome email with all the account details. Then set a 7-day timer wait. After the wait, send a follow-up survey to check how onboarding went.

checklist.item: Creates email account, Slack workspace account, and project management tool account in parallel (3 concurrent branches)
All 3 parallel account creation branches must complete before proceeding (join/merge step)
Sends a welcome email after all accounts are created
Has a 7-day timer wait after the welcome email
Sends a follow-up survey after the 7-day wait
Receives new employee data from the POST request body
Welcome email includes details for all three created accounts (email, Slack, and project management tool)
Follow-up survey is targeted to the onboarded employee to check how onboarding went
